title: horkelia campestris
intro: Horkelia campestris, also known as coastal horkelia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Horkelia campestris can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
